name: Compound Interest: Simple Annual
short_description: Calculates the compound interest earned on an initial principal amount over a given number of years with annual compounding.

inputs.name: principal
inputs.description: The initial principal amount.

inputs.name: r
inputs.description: The annual interest rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.05 for 5%).

inputs.name: time
inputs.description: The number of years the principal is invested.

name: Compound Interest: Quarterly Compounding
short_description: Calculates the total compound interest earned on an initial principal, given an annual interest rate compounded quarterly over a specified number of years.

inputs.name: principal
inputs.description: Initial investment amount

inputs.name: rate
inputs.description: Annual interest rate as a percentage (e.g., 5 for 5%)

inputs.name: time
inputs.description: Number of years the investment is held

name: Compound Interest: Rate, Time, and Frequency Known
short_description: Calculates the compound interest earned when the total accumulated amount, nominal annual interest rate, investment time, and compounding frequency are known.

inputs.name: total_amount
inputs.description: The final total amount received from the investment (A).

inputs.name: rate
inputs.description: The nominal annual interest rate (as a percentage, e.g., 5 for 5%).

inputs.name: time
inputs.description: The total number of years the investment was held.

inputs.name: n
inputs.description: The number of compounding periods per year (e.g., 2 for semi-annually, 4 for quarterly, 12 for monthly).

name: Compound Interest: Semi-Annual, Variable Rate
short_description: Calculates compound interest for an investment with semi-annual compounding where the annual interest rate changes mid-way through the investment period.

inputs.name: principal
inputs.description: The initial principal amount invested.

inputs.name: first_years
inputs.description: The number of years for which the first interest rate applies.

inputs.name: second_years
inputs.description: The number of years for which the second interest rate applies.

inputs.name: rate1
inputs.description: The annual interest rate (as a percentage) for the first period.

inputs.name: rate2
inputs.description: The annual interest rate (as a percentage) for the second period.

name: Compound Interest with Mid-Term Additional Deposit
short_description: Calculates the total compound interest earned on an initial principal with an additional mid-term deposit, considering periodic compounding.

inputs.name: principal
inputs.description: Initial investment amount

inputs.name: rate
inputs.description: Annual interest rate as a percentage

inputs.name: time
inputs.description: Total investment period in years

inputs.name: n
inputs.description: Number of compounding periods per year

inputs.name: deposit
inputs.description: Additional amount deposited mid-term

inputs.name: deposit_time
inputs.description: Year when the additional deposit is made
